title: ஆப்பிள் மரமும் விவசாயியும் (The Apple Tree and the Farmer) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: Where was the old apple tree located? / பழைய ஆப்பிள் மரம் எங்கு இருந்தது?
questions.explanation: The gnarled old apple tree was in the middle of the farmer's private garden.

questions.question: Who used to play under the tree as a boy? / சிறுவனாக இருந்தபோது மரத்தின் அடியில் விளையாடியது யார்?
questions.explanation: The farmer himself spent his childhood playing under the same tree.

questions.question: Which creatures lived in the apple tree? / ஆப்பிள் மரத்தில் வாழ்ந்த உயிரினங்கள் எவை?
questions.explanation: It was home to various birds and small animals like squirrels.

questions.question: Why did the farmer want to cut the tree? / விவசாயி ஏன் மரத்தை வெட்ட விரும்பினார்?
options: b) For timber to expand his house
questions.answer: b) For timber to expand his house
questions.explanation: He needed the wood (timber) to make new rooms for his home.

questions.question: The farmer's daughter pleaded to save the tree. / விவசாயியின் மகள் மரத்தைக் காப்பாற்றக் கெஞ்சினாள்.
questions.explanation: She and her friends begged him to stop cutting the tree.

questions.question: What tool did the farmer use? / விவசாயி எந்தக் கருவியைப் பயன்படுத்தினார்?
questions.explanation: The farmer took his sharp axe and began chopping the trunk.

questions.question: The tree had stopped ______ over the years. / காலப்போக்கில் மரம் ______ நிறுத்திவிட்டது.
questions.explanation: Since it was old, it no longer produced the apples it once did.

questions.question: What does 'Timber' mean? / 'Timber' என்றால் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Timber refers to wood prepared for use in building and carpentry.

questions.question: How did the animals feel when the farmer hit the tree? / விவசாயி மரத்தை வெட்டியபோது விலங்குகள் எப்படி உணர்ந்தன?
questions.explanation: They fluttered and ran about in fear for their home.

questions.question: What did the daughter find in the tree? / மகள் மரத்தில் எதனைக் கண்டாள்?
questions.explanation: She noticed something shiny and found a single, sweet apple in a hollow.

questions.question: After tasting the apple, the farmer became ______. / ஆப்பிளைச் சுவைத்த பிறகு விவசாயி ______.
questions.explanation: The taste reminded him of his childhood memories.

questions.question: The farmer realized that the tree was ______. / மரம் ______ என்பதை விவசாயி உணர்ந்தார்.
questions.explanation: He understood its aesthetic and emotional value beyond just timber.

questions.question: What did the animals promise the farmer? / விலங்குகள் விவசாயிக்கு என்ன வாக்குறுதி அளித்தன?
questions.explanation: They promised to fill his garden with music.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Hollow'? / 'Hollow' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Hollow means an empty space inside a solid object like a tree trunk.

questions.question: The story highlights the conflict between utility and ______. / இந்தக் கதை பயன்பாட்டிற்கும் ______ க்கும் இடையிலான மோதலைக் காட்டுகிறது?
questions.explanation: It balances the need for wood against the need to protect the ecosystem.

questions.question: Who else helped the daughter to save the tree? / மரத்தைக் காப்பாற்ற மகளுக்கு வேறு யார் உதவினார்கள்?
questions.explanation: All the village children joined her in the protest.

questions.question: Antonym of 'Valuable' is ______. / 'Valuable' என்பதன் எதிர்ச்சொல் ______.
questions.explanation: Useless is the opposite of being valuable or helpful.

questions.question: What kind of ecosystem service does a tree provide? / ஒரு மரம் எவ்வகை சூழலியல் சேவையை வழங்குகிறது?
questions.explanation: Trees provide essential benefits like cooling shade and food.

questions.question: The tree was the farmer's childhood ______. / அந்த மரம் விவசாயியின் குழந்தைப்பருவ ______.
questions.explanation: It was his favorite companion when he was a little boy.

questions.question: A gnarled tree is one that is ______. / Gnarled மரம் என்பது ______.
questions.explanation: Gnarled refers to old trees with many knots and twisted branches.

questions.question: How did the farmer react initially to the pleas? / ஆரம்பத்தில் கெஞ்சியபோது விவசாயி எவ்வாறு எதிர்வினையாற்றினார்?
questions.explanation: He kept shouting and chopping, not listening at first.

questions.question: What made the farmer change his mind? / விவசாயியின் மனதை மாற்றியது எது?
questions.explanation: The sweetness of the apple brought back happy memories.

questions.question: Trees provide a habitat for ______. / மரங்கள் ______ ஒரு வாழிடத்தை வழங்குகின்றன.
questions.explanation: Trees are essential habitats for many species of life.

questions.question: What is the moral lesson? / அறநெறிப் பாடம் என்ன?
options: a) Trees are for wood only
questions.explanation: Nature should be preserved for its intrinsic value.

questions.question: Meaning of 'Plead'? / 'Plead' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Pleading is asking for something very earnestly.

questions.question: The axe is used for ______. / கோடாரி ______ பயன்படுத்தப்படுகிறது.
questions.explanation: An axe is a tool for cutting wood.

questions.question: The daughter's find was a '______'.
questions.explanation: She found a single, surprisingly sweet apple.

questions.question: Who are the silent sufferers of deforestation? / காடழிப்பினால் மௌனமாகப் பாதிக்கப்படுபவர்கள் யார்?
questions.explanation: They lose their home when trees are cut down.

questions.question: Trees act as a bridge between childhood and ______. / மரங்கள் குழந்தைப்பருவத்திற்கும் ______ க்கும் பாலமாக உள்ளன?
questions.explanation: The farmer's childhood was linked to the tree even in his adulthood.

questions.question: The garden became a '______ paradise'.
questions.explanation: The story ends with a mention of the green, living garden.
